visual_description: Stretching across the panel, a vast, dark mountain range is shrouded in heavy mist under a cloudy night sky with a full moon and falling snow. Silhouetted trees and foliage frame the foreground.

Running forward with a desperate, pained expression, a young person with spiky dark purple hair and torn white robes is covered in dirt and sweat against a blurry, streaked grey-green background.

Looking wide-eyed and shocked, a character with dark hair and purple eyes is shown in a close-up, with motion lines in the background suggesting intense emotion or movement.
Tumbling down a steep, dark, rocky cliff face, a young person in light, tattered clothes is shown in three stages of their painful fall, kicking up dust and debris.

ocr_text: ...SHIT!! / I CAN'T MOVE... MY LEG ANYMORE...!
visual_description: Collapsing face down on the ground, a person with dark purple hair and torn white and blue clothes lies injured, hands splayed, amidst scattered debris in a desolate environment. It's a medium shot focusing on their upper body.
Staring intensely, a character with dark purple hair and a magenta eye is shown in an extreme close-up, with dirt and smoke around their face, suggesting a tense situation.
Kneeling on the dirty ground, a person's hands and lower legs are visible, covered in dirt, with torn clothing on one arm. Close-up shot.

Walking across desolate, cracked ground, a small figure in light clothes is observed by two dark-cloaked figures partially visible in the foreground, framing the scene. It's a medium shot from a slightly high angle.

ocr_text: THAT I'VE BEEN DANCING IN THE MIDDLE OF YOUR PALMS FROM THE START...
visual_description: Standing defiantly, a person with dark hair in light clothing faces multiple red-cloaked figures under a bright full moon. Some cloaked figures are perched on a large tree, others on the ground and a cliff, in a misty, dark outdoor setting.
Displaying the exclamatory word 'FUCK!' in bold, black, italicized letters against a plain white background, serving as a strong sound effect or reaction.
Curving downwards with a sharp angle, a thick black line forms an abstract, incomplete shape against a plain white background, suggesting a partial outline or a stylized element.

Gritting their teeth and staring intensely, a person with long dark hair and purple eyes is shown in an extreme close-up. Their face is covered in cuts and sweat droplets, indicating pain or exertion.

ocr_text: YOU MUST'VE HAD QUITE A LOT OF TROUBLE RUNNING FOR AN HOUR TO REACH HERE. / WELL DONE, PRINCE CHEON. / HEHE... / ALL THIS WAITING HAD ME AT THE POINT OF FALLING ASLEEP.
visual_description: Standing on a rock, a cloaked figure with a sword addresses two other cloaked figures who are crouching below, in a dark, rocky outdoor setting. The figures wear face coverings.

ocr_text: ...WHAT SHOULD I DO!?! / I DON'T HAVE THE STRENGTH TO RUN AWAY EITHER...
visual_description: Facing three cloaked enemies with glowing weapons in a misty forest, a purple-haired figure in tattered clothes stands with their back to the viewer. One enemy is in a tree, two are on the ground. Medium shot.
A stylized black outline of a curved shape, resembling a greater-than symbol or a chevron, points towards the right. It is an abstract graphic element.
Outlining the top-left corner, a thick black curved line is visible against a white background.

ocr_text: ON ENROLLING INTO / THE ACADEMY— / WHAT MORE DO YOU WANT FROM ME? WHY ARE YOU AIMING FOR MY LIFE?
visual_description: Standing defiantly with a pained expression, a young man with long dark hair and tattered clothes looks forward. He has sweat and scratches on his face and chest. The background is dark and misty with faint tree branches.

ocr_text: EVEN IF YOU GAVE UP ON THE ACADEMY OR YOU HAVE ABSOLUTELY NO TALENT IN MAR- TIAL ARTS, YOU SHOULD KNOW THAT SOMETHING LIKE THAT DOESN'T MATTER, RIGHT PRINCE CHEON?
visual_description: Speaking intensely, a cloaked figure with dark skin, glowing purple eyes, and a face mask looks directly forward in a medium close-up. They wear a dark hooded cloak against a plain, dark background.

ocr_text: AS LONG AS YOU HAVE A RIGHT TO THE THRONE, THIS IS THE ONLY WAY, PRINCE. / GIVE IT UP- THERE'S NO OTHER WAY OUT.
visual_description: Two cloaked figures confront an unseen opponent, one drawing a glowing sword. They wear dark hoods and face masks, standing under a full moon with trees in the background. Medium shot.

ocr_text: HAVE 'PEASANT BLOOD' MIXED IN YOU, / 끼이이잉 / SINCE YOU ARE OF THE BLOODLINE OF THAT PERSON, WE'LL SEND YOU OFF WITH A PAINLESS DEATH.
